productDisplayName: Jockey ZONE Men White Trunks US19
description: Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this modern boxer brief from jockey. The superior cotton rib fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered contoured pouch offers maximum support. Crafted from 100% premium combed cotton rib fabric Features a contrast colour, durable plush inner waistband for a smooth and comfortable grip Double layered contoured pouch for maximum support and comfort Unique leg treatment eliminates the fabric from & ldquo riding up& rdquo Low rise Fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
